channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-20 08:20 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Starting today, use your Grok or X Premium subscription in@openclaw. Chat with your agent, generate ...
item.description: Starting today, use your Grok or X Premium subscription in@openclaw. Chat with your agent, generate images and videos, or search for X posts.x.ai/news/grok-openclaw

item.title: @elonmusk: Release notes for Grok Build will be published daily
item.description: Release notes for Grok Build will be published daily

item.title: @elonmusk: A jury sided with Sam Altman and OpenAI in court. But Elon Musk won in the court of public opinion, ...
item.description: A jury sided with Sam Altman and OpenAI in court. But Elon Musk won in the court of public opinion, writes Tim Higgins.on.wsj.com/4uRJ68y

item.title: @elonmusk: 🔥 JD Vance just wrapped his press briefing by voicing his FULL SUPPORT for Tommy Robinson's Unite th...
item.description: 🔥 JD Vance just wrapped his press briefing by voicing his FULL SUPPORT for Tommy Robinson's Unite the Kingdom rally "What you see all over the west is this idea that the way to generate prosperity is to bring in MILLIONS AND MILLIONS of unvetted people and drop them into your neighborhoods. And we simply REJECT that idea. So to everybody in the UK who rejects that idea, I'd encourage them to just KEEP ON GOING. It's OKAY to want to defend your culture." It is NOT racist to want to protect your borders. Don't let anyone tell you that. Keep pushing,@TRobinsonNewEra

item.description: Just tap the Grok logo

item.title: @elonmusk: Secretary Lutnick met with@SpaceXPresident and COO@Gwynne_Shotwell. The Commerce Department is focus...
item.description: Secretary Lutnick met with@SpaceXPresident and COO@Gwynne_Shotwell. The Commerce Department is focused on dominating supply chains and trade, from America to orbit.

item.description: Starship Rising

item.title: @elonmusk: This is even more impressive when you remember each of these engines is 10 feet tall. Starship is ab...
item.description: This is even more impressive when you remember each of these engines is 10 feet tall. Starship is absolutely massive.

item.title: @elonmusk: Rockets need a hug too! Starship becoming fully reusable is our ticket to Kardashev civilization.

item.title: @elonmusk: Innocents matter more then criminals
item.description: Innocents matter more then criminals

item.title: @elonmusk: A study done on 361,645 job applications in almost 30 countries over the last 40 years discovered th...
item.description: A study done on 361,645 job applications in almost 30 countries over the last 40 years discovered the hiring bias in society is actually against MEN, not women.

item.title: @elonmusk: When editing a video with Grok Build, you could actually annotate the layout of a video frame and in...
item.description: When editing a video with Grok Build, you could actually annotate the layout of a video frame and instruct Grok to make a change -- for example: "lower the text box in the red circle". Neat.

item.title: @elonmusk: Had always heard that the “replacement level” total fertility rate is 2.1 children per woman, but di...
item.description: Had always heard that the “replacement level” total fertility rate is 2.1 children per woman, but didn’t realize this was the reason:

item.title: @elonmusk: Regarding the OpenAI case, the judge & jury never actually ruled on the merits of the case, just on ...
item.description: Regarding the OpenAI case, the judge & jury never actually ruled on the merits of the case, just on a calendar technicality. There is no question to anyone following the case in detail that Altman & Brockman did in fact enrich themselves by stealing a charity. The only question is WHEN they did it! I will be filing an appeal with the Ninth Circuit, because creating a precedent to loot charities is incredibly destructive to charitable giving in America. OpenAI was founded to benefit all of humanity.
